scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build:renderer && (cd src-tauri && cargo check)
scripts.lint: pnpm run typecheck && eslint . --max-warnings 0 && (cd src-tauri && cargo check)
scripts.check:phase1-closeout: pnpm run generate:knowledge-base && pnpm run generate:who-lms-assets && pnpm run check:spec-consistency && pnpm run check:knowledge-base && pnpm run check:nurture-mode-safety && pnpm run check:ai-boundary && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:phase2-closeout: pnpm run generate:knowledge-base && pnpm run generate:who-lms-assets && pnpm run check:spec-consistency && pnpm run check:knowledge-base && pnpm run check:nurture-mode-safety && pnpm run check:ai-boundary && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
